title: Water Bottle Policy
text: Fans are allowed to bring one clear, factory-sealed plastic water bottle (up to 20 oz). Reusable water bottles must be completely empty upon entry and can be filled at water fountains inside.

title: Gate Opening Times
text: All stadium gates open 2 hours prior to the scheduled match kickoff time. VIP and Early Access ticket holders may enter 3 hours before kickoff via Gate West.

title: Bag Policy
text: Only clear bags (maximum size 12" x 6" x 12") and small clutch purses (maximum size 4.5" x 6.5") are permitted. Backpacks and opaque bags of any kind are strictly prohibited.

title: Sustainability Info
text: Our stadium is committed to zero waste. Please use the clearly marked green recycling bins for plastic/aluminum and compost bins for food waste. Consider taking the Metro or the free Downtown Shuttle to reduce carbon emissions.
